log: === INITIATIVE ===

Minotaur — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Minotaur — Bardic Musician for 8. HP: 22/67

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
